case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. AMERICAN HOTELS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN HOTELS, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
